subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My Glory! The missive from Jinab-i-Ismu'llah Jamál and Samandar - upon both of them be My Glory - which was addressed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب اسم الله جمال و سمندر علیهما بهائی که بشما
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
